untranslatable_reason: Three-candle pattern recognition (Abandoned Baby) requires multi-candle state tracking and doji identification logic not available in single-bar indicator set. Specifically: (1) detecting doji pattern on candle[1], (2) verifying gaps between three consecutive candles, (3) confirming uptrend context prior to entry. The available indicators lack candle[0], candle[1], candle[2] array access and doji classification. Pattern requires: candle[0]=white, candle[1]=doji with gap above candle[0], candle[2]=black with gap below candle[1].
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using body direction and wick relationships, but true Abandoned Baby pattern requires multi-bar state machine and gap detection between specific candles that cannot be reliably expressed with available single-bar indicators and prev_* references alone.
